auth.dontHaveAccount: You don't have an account yet?
auth.enterYourEmail: Enter the email address associated with your account, and we'll send you instructions on how to reset your password.
auth.sendEmailWithPasswordReset: Send a link to reset password
auth.enterNewPasswordMessage: Enter a new password below to change your password.
auth.passwordResetLinkSent: An email containing a link to reset your password has been sent to the email address you provided. If you haven't received it, please try again in {remaining} seconds.
auth.passwordChangedSuccessfully: The password has been changed successfully.
